description: Havn plugin hooks — git hooks, plugin sync, memory lifecycle

hooks.prompt:
Extract insights from this conversation worth persisting to MEMORY.md. An insight qualifies only if ALL four gates pass:

1. **Confirmed** — actually verified this session, not speculative
2. **Not in MEMORY.md** — check the MEMORY.md content visible in this context
3. **Not in CLAUDE.md** — check the CLAUDE.md content visible in this context
4. **Behavioral** — would change how a future agent acts in this codebase

For each qualifying insight, output:
- **Section**: one of Gotchas, Conventions, Decisions, Procedures, User Preferences
- **Text**: the exact line to add, matching the terse style of existing entries

If nothing qualifies, say so in one line. Do not call any tools — your text output is the deliverable.
